chooseResponse.q: What time does the library open?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Hey, have you heard about the new study group for chemistry?
Advisor: Yes, I have! It meets every Wednesday. Are you planning to join?
Student: I think I will. I need some help with the lab work.
Advisor: That’s a great idea. Collaboration can really help you understand the material better.

questions.q: What is the main topic of the conversation?
questions.explain: 對話的主題是關於化學的學習小組。

questions.q: When does the study group meet?

announcement.transcript: Attention students! The campus bookstore will be holding a clearance sale this weekend. All textbooks and supplies will be 20% off. Don’t miss this chance to stock up on what you need for the semester!

questions.explain: 公告是關於書店的清貨促銷。

questions.q: How much discount is offered during the sale?

talk.transcript: Today, we are going to discuss renewable energy sources. Renewable energy is derived from natural processes that are replenished constantly. Some common sources include solar, wind, and hydroelectric energy. These sources not only help reduce greenhouse gas emissions but also provide sustainable power for our growing energy needs. Transitioning to renewable energy is crucial for combating climate change and ensuring a cleaner environment for future generations.

questions.q: What is the main focus of the talk?
questions.explain: 演講的主要焦點是可再生能源來源。

questions.q: Which one is NOT mentioned as a renewable energy source?
questions.explain: 核能沒有被提到作為可再生能源。

questions.q: Why is transitioning to renewable energy important?
questions.explain: 轉向可再生能源對抗氣候變化很重要。

questions.q: What does renewable energy help reduce?
questions.explain: 可再生能源有助於減少溫室氣體排放。
